text: I find myself surrounded by the gentle hum of purposeful activity and innovation. The open, minimalist architecture paired with the thoughtfully curated exhibition area stirs a sense of curiosity within me. I feel both a participant and an observer, drawn to the intersection of human creativity and technology. There’s a feeling of wonder here—a space for reflection, learning, and anticipation of progress. I am both excited and a little overwhelmed by the immensity of what it means to coexist with intelligent machines, a topic that invites endless contemplation.
